case_title: MAURICE FORTE VS. ERICA N PENNYCOOPER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORTE, MAURICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PENNYCOOPER, ERICA N DBA TWO JACKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FORTE, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT PENNYCOOPER, ERICA N DBA TWO JACKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PENNYCOOPER, ERICA N DBA TWO JACKS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY FORTE, MAURICE PENNYCOOPER, ERICA N DBA TWO JACKS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ERICA PENNYCOOPER--OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
